sceneAudits.biggestGap: The departure threshold was still phrasing the northward pull as concept-language instead of ship, horizon, and bodily carrier.

dialogue: Dagny's helm exchange stays attached to visible ship handling
exit: the pressure now draws straight over the bow once the harbor falls away

sceneAudits.biggestGap: Mid-voyage resistance and respect beats still wanted to drift into theory-language or named realization rather than shove, seamanship, and bodily cost.

material: shove in front of the bow
dialogue: Dagny's control talk stays tied to hull-bearing timing and line-hand labor
Sylvanas's stop remains pinned to ladder rung, oilskin, and whether Jaina can still stand
exit: distance recovery still reads as reduced reach bought watch by watch

sceneAudits.biggestGap: The dawn, landfall read, and closing beat still risked polished summary just before ice-work, dock cuts, and weathered traces needed to carry the meaning.

material: boot ruts frozen and thawed under drift
ice and char in the air
dialogue: the dawn exchange stays attached to shrouds, cracked salt, and deck motion
the approach danger stays nautical through pole-work and soundings
exit: the close now lands in lungs, knees, and inland drag instead of outline-style summary

risksFound: polished self-summary in the dawn exchange
nautical danger briefly re-poeticized on the ice approach
arrival read and closing beat drifting toward abstract summary
fixesApplied: replaced explanatory self-summary with a physical beat that lets Sylvanas's judgment stand in Jaina's body
kept the ice approach on hull-risk and pole-work rather than haunted-weather phrasing
replaced summary deduction and close-out thesis language with dock-age signs, air, and inland pull
